tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe wypowiedzi (1.1.–1.6.), wybierając spośród podanych możliwości. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.prompt: Don't count your _______ before they hatch. Wait until you actually get the offer.
We hit it _______ straight away — it felt like we'd known each other for years.
She passed her exams with flying _______ and got the highest marks in the class.
The lecture went completely over my _______. I didn't understand a word.
They decided to bury the _______ and stop arguing after five years of not speaking.
The two brothers are like two _______ in a pod — they look and act exactly the same.
